## Pull Request Checklist

Thank you for contributing to the Taiji Publications & Talks portal!

### Type of Change
- [ ] New publication
- [ ] New talk
- [ ] Update existing content
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update

### Content Validation
- [ ] All required YAML frontmatter fields are filled
- [ ] File naming follows convention (YYYY-MM-DD-short-title.md)
- [ ] Author/speaker information is accurate
- [ ] Links (arXiv, DOI, slides, video) are valid and working
- [ ] Keywords are appropriate and from controlled vocabulary
- [ ] Abstract/description is clear and concise
- [ ] No sensitive or personal information included

### Quality Checks
- [ ] Markdown formatting is correct
- [ ] No spelling or grammatical errors
- [ ] Content is relevant to Taiji mission
- [ ] Follows contribution guidelines in CONTRIBUTING.md

### Additional Information

**Description of changes:**


**Related issue:** (if applicable)


---

By submitting this pull request, I confirm that my contribution is made under the terms of the project license.
